subject: F1000 Monthly Update - April 2015
body:
To ensure you receive F1000 emails, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.

-----------------------------------------------------

Faculty of 1000 |  http://f1000.com                
Monthly Update  |  April 2015

----------------------------------------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    
F1000 launches the new F1000Workspace in May 
- Get ready to try it
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    

F1000 is launching the new F1000Workspace suite of tools in May. This will mean that F1000 now offers three services:

* F1000Prime - recommended articles selected by the F1000 Faculty
* F1000Research - our innovative publishing platform
* F1000Workspace - a new set of tools for scientists

NEW - F1000Workspace will speed up and simplify the tasks involved in writing, collecting literature, collaboration, reference management, preparing for publication and, finally, publishing research findings.

As a F1000 subscriber you will have full access to F1000Workspace. Be ready to be surprised!

To find out more, watch this short video: [ https://vimeo.com/111510777 ].

- Vitek Tracz, Founder and Chairman, F1000.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------                                                 
"After spending only an hour with the new F1000Workspace I quickly understood that the software was designed with modern internet-based scientists in mind. The platform elegantly integrates my web-based research and publication needs, without the bloat and excess of existing reference managers. I am certain the F1000 platform will increase my productivity and make journal reading, annotation, and referencing a seamless and more enjoyable process. I am recommending the platform to all my scientific colleagues."

Richard Cho - Massachusetts Institute of Technology
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------                                                 


   F1000Prime                                
==================
  
Below is a selection of recommendations added by our Faculty of 10,000+ Members over the past month:

13 *

Engineering HIV immunity 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/725357109?key=0gASC5Ho6dhK3FU ]
A novel molecule, eCD4-Ig, could prevent HIV-1 infections, ultimately acting like an HIV-1 vaccine. "Could this be the start of the HIV prevention breakthrough we have been patiently waiting for?"
Gardner MR, Kattenhorn LM, Kondur HR et al.
Nature. 2015; 519:87-91


9 *

Whatever will B cell be? 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/725333640?key=SeVd9YG09mHtgbl ]
This thought-provoking article demonstrates that naive B cells can differentiate into four effector cell types when exposed to antigens: plasma cells, activated precursors, germinal center B cells and memory B cells.
Taylor JJ, Pape KA, Steach HR et al.
Science. 2015; 347:784-7


6 *

Delivering sugar 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/725398372?key=o2rRqyRZ5qomF2T ]
An important step forward in clarifying the pathway via which sugars are supplied to the developing zygotic embryo during Arabidopsis seed development. Three sucrose transporters - SWEET11, 12 and 15 - transfer sugars from seed coat to embryo.
Chen LQ, Lin IW, Qu XQ et al.
Plant Cell. 2015 [Epub ahead of print]


F1000Prime Reports
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Open-access review journal [ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/ ], reporting on the hottest topics.

Cochlear implantation: a biomechanical prosthesis for hearing loss 
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/m/7/45 ]
Cochlear implantation is one of the most significant advances in modern medicine, but does not restore all facets of hearing. New developments in these devices offer the promise of improved quality of life for patients with hearing loss.
F1000Prime Report by Yawn R, Hunter JB, Sweeney AD, Bennett ML [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/1616796895254771 ].
F1000Prime Rep 2015, 7:45.

 ---------------
 See all recent F1000Prime Reports          
 >> http://f1000.com/prime/reports/                 
 --------------- 

---------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~
F1000Prime mobile app 
~~~~~~~~~
Use F1000Prime on the go with our user-friendly mobile app [ http://f1000.com/prime/mobile ]. Keep up to date with the best papers while on the move. Find out more [ http://f1000.com/prime/mobile ].


~~~~~~~~~
F1000 Specialists programme 
~~~~~~~~~
Join F1000's global community of science communication enthusiasts - become an F1000 Specialist [ http://f1000.com/specialists ].

---------------------- 

    
   F1000Research                      
======================

Our innovative open science publishing platform [ http://f1000research.com/ ] offering rapid publication, open peer review and open data. 

Below is a selection of our latest peer reviewed articles:

REVIEW
Interpretation of mRNA splicing mutations in genetic disease: review of the literature and guidelines for information-theoretical analysis [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-282/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/54y ]
Published: 17 Mar 2015
Caminsky NG, Mucaki EJ, Rogan PK
F1000Research 2015, 3:282

METHOD ARTICLE
Guiding Ebola patients to suitable health facilities: an SMS-based approach [ http://f1000research.com/articles/4-43 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/51l ]
Published: 12 Feb 2015
Trad MA, Jurdak R, Rana R
F1000Research 2015, 4:43

OPINION ARTICLE
The role of globalization in drug development and access to orphan drugs: orphan drug legislation in the US/EU and in Latin America [ http://f1000research.com/articles/4-57/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/3ix ]
Published: 27 Feb 2015
Arnold RJG, Bighash L, Bryon Nieto A et al.
F1000Research 2015, 4:57

RESEARCH NOTE
An Open Science Peer Review Oath [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-271/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/4wf ]
Published: 9 Jan 2015
Aleksic J, Alexa A, Attwood TK et al.
F1000Research 2015, 3:271

 ---------------------------------------------
  Submit now to F1000Research          
  >> http://f1000research.com/author/submit        
 ---------------------------------------------- 

~~~~~~~~~ 
MSF Scientific Day
~~~~~~~~~ 

7 and 8 May 2015

Two days.
Two countries.
A worldwide audience.

F1000Research are sponsoring the upcoming MSF (Medecins Sans Frontieres/Doctors Without Borders) Scientific Day, which will be streamed live online from the UK [ http://www.msf.org.uk/msf-scientific-day ] and India [ http://www.msfindia.in/msf-scientific-day-india ]. See how humanitarian research, innovation and technology can help save lives. Find out more [ http://www.msf.org.uk/msf-scientific-day ].
 

     F1000Posters                 
======================

Open Repository [ http://f1000.com/posters ] for posters and slide presentations; completely free to view and submit. Below is a selection:


MICROBIOLOGY   
Influenza pseudotypes and pandemic preparedness 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097703 ]
Ferrara F, Molesti E, Temperton N.
F1000Posters 2015, 6:243

RHEUMATOLOGY
Tissue chitchat: wired communication between cells 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097688 ]
Byrne RA, von Dalwigk K, Olmos Calvo I et al.
F1000Posters 2015, 6:236

PUBLISHING, EDUCATION & COMMUNICATION
Where and what are Chileans researching in the USA? 
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1097696 ]
Vasquez Doorman V, Rojas LA, Boric K et al.
F1000Posters 2015, 6:232


  ----------------------------------------------
  Deposit now        
  >> http://f1000.com/posters/fordepositors      
  ----------------------------------------------

 
----------------------

 * Follow us on Twitter * 
  
@F1000 [ http://twitter.com/f1000 ]  
@F1000Research [ http://twitter.com/f1000research ]     
@F1000Posters [ http://twitter.com/f1000posters ]  
 
  * 'Like' us on Facebook * 
  
F1000Prime [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000Research ]   
 
  * Connect with us on LinkedIn *  
  
Faculty of 1000 [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=1971657 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?home=&gid=4267793 ]  
F1000 Specialists [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=8123808 ]  
  
 * Follow our blogs * 
  
F1000Prime Blog [ http://blog.f1000.com/ ]
F1000Research Blog [ http://blog.f1000research.com/ ]
 
 
----------------------


-----------------------------------------------------   

You have received this message because you asked to receive the F1000 Monthly Update to your registered email address from Faculty of 1000. If you do not wish to receive any further such messages, you may unsubscribe [ http://www.f1000.com/unsubscribe/email?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&emailAlertType=MONTHLY_UPDATES ] at any time. For further information or enquiries please contact Customer Services at info@f1000.com [ mailto:info@f1000.com ].

Faculty of 1000 Ltd | Science Navigation Group 
Registered in England and Wales with Company Number 3739756 
Middlesex House, 34-42 Cleveland Street | London, W1T 4LB | United Kingdom
